description: CompositionPurple long tube top made of 100% cotton, with drawstring waist and concealed pocketsWash care1. Wash dark colours separately2. Use mild detergent in warm water (maximum 40 degrees)3. Do not wring or bleach4. Flat dry in shade5. Do not iron on printFittingRegular FitThis is one piece that can be dressed up or dressed down according to the occassion. Get the temperature soaring in this purple tube top from jealous 21. The drawstring waist and concealed pockets give it a casual look. Wear it with leggings in bright colours and a simple bolero jacket for instant cool. Model's statistics1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-5.6", Chest-32"
